name: Dilled Peas and Walnuts
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fresh shelled peas or 1 10 oz package frozen peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the peas in lightly salted boiling water for 3-5 minutes or until tender.
2. Meanwhile, heat butter in a saucepan. Add onion and sauté until tender and golden, about 2 minutes.
3. Remove and drain the peas.
4. Place the hot, blanched peas into the pan with the onions. Toss in the dill, season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Toss in the walnuts and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
